investments.description: Every investment holding or position in this document — one object per holding.

holding_name.description: Name of the holding / company / fund

quantity.description: Units / shares held as a number

cost_basis.description: Total cost basis as a number

current_value.description: Current market value as a number

ownership_percentage.description: Ownership percentage as a number if shown

valuation_date.description: Date of this valuation, ISO YYYY-MM-DD
